    ON qsqt.query_text_id = qsq.query_text_id   
JOIN sys.query_store_plan qsp   
    ON qsq.query_id = qsp.query_id   
JOIN sys.query_store_runtime_stats qsrs   
    ON qsp.plan_id = qsrs.plan_id  
JOIN sys.query_store_runtime_stats_interval qsrsi   
    ON qsrs.runtime_stats_interval_id = qsrsi.runtime_stats_interval_id  
WHERE CONVERT(datetime2, SWITCHOFFSET (qsrsi.start_time , @tzoffset)) >= DATEADD(hour, -24.5, @record_date)    
AND qsrs.max_duration > 1000000

					0 AS result_code, activity_time, NULL AS result_text, centre_no, window_no, customer_session_id, b.rtsn, ticket_cost_amt, terminal_id, b.num_of_ticket, accmode, b.customer_session_balance_amt
				FROM dbo.customer_transaction_enquiries b  
					LEFT JOIN ticket_enquiries c WITH (FORCESEEK)
					ON b.rtsn = c.rtsn
				WHERE b.activity_bizdate = @enq_bizdate
				AND b.system_id = @system_id
				AND b.activity_code NOT IN (1, 9, 24)
				AND b.centre_no = @centre_no
				AND b.num_of_ticket BETWEEN @minqty AND @maxqty
				ORDER BY  b.customer_session_id DESC, b.activity_id DESC

(@tzoffset int,@record_date datetime,@timestamp nvarchar(20))select top 50
	@record_date as [datetime],
	CAST(serverproperty(N'Servername') AS sysname) AS [instance_name],
	CAST(serverproperty(N'MachineName') AS sysname) AS [machine_name],
	db_name() as db_name,	
	CONVERT(datetime2, SWITCHOFFSET (qsrs.first_execution_time , @tzoffset)) creation_time,
	CONVERT(datetime2, SWITCHOFFSET (qsrs.last_execution_time , @tzoffset)) last_execution_time,
	cast(qsrs.count_executions*qsrs.avg_duration as decimal) as total_elapsed_time ,
	cast(qsrs.max_duration/1000.0 as decimal) as max_elapsed_time ,
	cast(qsrs.avg_duration/1000.0 as decimal) as [avg_elapsed_time],
	cast(qsrs.count_executions*qsrs.avg_cpu_time as decimal) as total_worker_time,
	cast(qsrs.max_cpu_time/1000.0 as decimal) as max_worker_time,
	cast(qsrs.avg_cpu_time/1000.0 as decimal) as [avg_worker_time],
	qsrs.avg_logical_io_reads as [avg_logical_reads],
	qsrs.max_logical_io_reads as [max_logical_reads],
	qsrs.avg_logical_io_writes as [avg_logical_writes],
	qsrs.max_logical_io_writes as [max_logical_writes],
	qsrs.count_executions,
	(qsrs.avg_logical_io_reads+qsrs.avg_logical_io_writes)/2 [avg_io],
	qsrs.avg_rowcount,
	NULL statement_start_offset,
	NULL statement_end_offset,
	qsqt.statement_sql_handle as sql_handle,
	sys.fn_varbintohexstr(qsqt.statement_sql_handle) + '_QS_' + @timestamp COLLATE Latin1_General_BIN2 as FileName,
	qsqt.query_sql_text AS query_text,
	qsp.query_plan as FileContent  
FROM sys.query_store_query qsq 
JOIN sys.query_store_query_text qsqt   
    ON qsqt.query_text_id = qsq.query_text_id   
JOIN sys.query_store_plan qsp   
    ON qsq.query_id = qsp.query_id   
JOIN sys.query_store_runtime_stats qsrs   
    ON qsp.plan_id = qsrs.plan_id  
JOIN sys.query_store_runtime_stats_interval qsrsi   
    ON qsrs.runtime_stats_interval_id = qsrsi.runtime_stats_interval_id  
WHERE CONVERT(datetime2, SWITCHOFFSET (qsrsi.start_time , @tzoffset)) >= DATEADD(hour, -24.5, @record_date)    
AND qsrs.max_duration > 1000000   
ORDER BY qsrs.avg_duration DESC

SELECT DISTINCT b.name AS table_name, a.name AS index_name
        FROM sys.indexes a
            INNER JOIN sys.tables b
                ON a.object_id = b.object_id
            CROSS APPLY sys.dm_db_index_physical_stats(DB_ID(), a.object_id, a.index_id, NULL, DEFAULT) stats
        WHERE b.is_memory_optimized = 0 
        AND a.type > 0
        AND stats.avg_fragmentation_in_percent BETWEEN 15 AND 30 
        --AND stats.page_count > 500
        ORDER BY b.name, a.name

UPDATE m 
							SET m.cont_liab = t.conti_liab
							, last_upd_time = SYSDATETIME()
							FROM dbo.vcomb_comb_mappings m 
							INNER JOIN (
								SELECT comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no,  SUM(comming_banker.unit_bet * case when comming_banker.winning_status = 0 then comming_banker.odds else 1 end * ISNULL(paied_banker.banker_odds,1)) AS conti_liab
								FROM dbo.temp_banker_data AS comming_banker 
								LEFT JOIN 
									(
                        				SELECT foc_seq_no,bet_no,dbo.aggodds(winning_status,odds) AS banker_odds
										FROM dbo.temp_banker_data 
										WHERE winning_status <> 0 
										GROUP BY foc_seq_no,bet_no
									) AS paied_banker ON comming_banker.foc_seq_no = paied_banker.foc_seq_no AND comming_banker.bet_no = paied_banker.bet_no
								--WHERE comming_banker.winning_status = 0  -- comment out this sentence becasue paid out combination also needs to be re-calc
								GROUP BY comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no
							) t ON m.vcomb_id = t.vcomb_id and m.leg_no = t.leg_no

(@last_60_bizdate int,@update_bizdate int,@payout_expired_bizdate int)INSERT INTO dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1331
           (bizdate
		   ,sports_id
		   ,event_id
           ,frontend_id
           ,BusinessDateOfEvent
           ,IsPayoutExpiredToday
           ,NoOfPayoutTicketToday
           ,PayoutOfTicketPaidToday
           ,NoOfUnpaidTicket
           ,LiabilityOfUnpaidTicket
           ,NoOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,TotalNoOfExpiredTicket
           ,TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket
		   ,update_time)
		SELECT  
			@update_bizdate,
		    ISNULL(c.sports_id, 0)						as SportsID,
			c.event_id 		as event_id,
			CASE WHEN c.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(c.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END									AS FrontendID,
			ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0)	as BusinessDateOfEvent,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate AND SUM(case when ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 
																				when ticket_status <> 2 AND c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate then 1
																				else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,
			--case when ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate and SUM(CASE when ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,
            sum (case when c.paid_bizdate=@update_bizdate and ticket_status in (7, 8) then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfPayoutTicketToday,  --7 paid
			sum (case when c.paid_bizdate=@update_bizdate and ticket_status in (7, 8) then c.total_payout_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end ) as PayoutOfTicketPaidToday,
			sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate>=@payout_expired_bizdate OR c.is_settled = 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.div_cal_amt > 0 THEN 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfUnpaidTicket,  --2 sold
			sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate>=@payout_expired_bizdate OR c.is_settled = 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.div_cal_amt > 0 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end ) as LiabilityOfUnpaidTicket,  --2 sold
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate and ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfExpiredTicketToday,  	--41 PayoutStarted
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate and ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end )  as LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday,  
			sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate and ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfExpiredTicketToday,  	--41 PayoutStarted
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate and ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end )  as LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday,
             --sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate<=@payout_expired_bizdate and c.payout_expire_bizdate <> 0 and ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as TotalNoOfExpiredTicket,  			
             --sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate<=@payout_expired_bizdate and c.payout_expire_bizdate <> 0 and ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt  else 0 end ) as TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket 
			dbo.udf_get_time()
		FROM(/*
				SELECT	DISTINCT 
					ft.sports_id, 
					ftc.frontend_id, 
					kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,
					ftd.concluded_bizdate,
					ft.ticket_status,
					ft.payout_expire_bizdate,
					ft.paid_bizdate,
					ftd.is_div_cal_done,
					AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, 
					AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, 
					AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt
				FROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft
				INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id
				INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id 
				INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftc.pool_id
				WHERE
				ft.is_cancel = 0
				AND	ftc.leg_order = 1
				AND ftc.combination_order = 1
				AND ft.ticket_status in (2, 7, 8)-- sold, paid, partial-pay
				AND ft.is_head_office=1
				AND ft.payout_expire_bizdate <=@update_bizdate
				UNION 
				*/
				SELECT 
					fmp.sports_type_id AS sports_id,
					fme.frontend_id,
					fme.event_id,
					kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,
					ft.ticket_status,
					isnull(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,
					ft.paid_bizdate,
					ftd.is_div_cal_done,
					ft.previous_payout_amt,
					ft.total_payout_amt,
					ftd.div_cal_amt,
					ftd.is_settled

					  INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = j.pool_id
					where

					UNION 
					select h.event_id,b.frontend_id 
					from 
					(
							select ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_id
							from 
							fo_tickets ft
							JOIN
							fo_ticket_dividends ftd
							on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id
							JOIN
							fo_ticket_betlines ftb
							on
							ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id
							where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0

							select ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_id
							from 
							settled_fo_tickets ft
							JOIN
							settled_fo_ticket_dividends ftd
							on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id
							JOIN
							settled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  --with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))
							on
							ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id
							LEFT JOIN (
										select --pool_id,
											t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, 
											CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_win

												 ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @update_bizdate
									) t3
								on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdate
							where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0
							and (ftd.is_settled = 0 or isnull(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) >= @update_bizdate)-- need to exclude payout expired ticket (safety when housekeep failed, usually housekeep will clean all payout expired tickets)

		   ,event_id
           ,frontend_id
           ,BusinessDateOfEvent
           ,IsPayoutExpiredToday

           ,PayoutOfTicketPaidToday
           ,NoOfUnpaidTicket
           ,LiabilityOfUnpaidTicket
           ,NoOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,TotalNoOfExpiredTicket

		SELECT  
			@update_bizdate,

			ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0)	as BusinessDateOfEvent,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate AND SUM(case when ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 
																				when ticket_status <> 2 AND c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate then 1
																				else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,
			--case when ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate and SUM(CASE when ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,

(@tzoffset int,@record_date datetime,@timestamp nvarchar(20))select top 50
	@record_date as [datetime],
	CAST(serverproperty(N'Servername') AS sysname) AS [instance_name],
	CAST(serverproperty(N'MachineName') AS sysname) AS [machine_name],
	db_name() as db_name,	
	CONVERT(datetime2, SWITCHOFFSET (qsrs.first_execution_time , @tzoffset)) creation_time,
	CONVERT(datetime2, SWITCHOFFSET (qsrs.last_execution_time , @tzoffset)) last_execution_time,
	cast(qsrs.count_executions*qsrs.avg_duration as decimal) as total_elapsed_time ,
	cast(qsrs.max_duration/1000.0 as decimal) as max_elapsed_time ,
	cast(qsrs.avg_duration/1000.0 as decimal) as [avg_elapsed_time],
	cast(qsrs.count_executions*qsrs.avg_cpu_time as decimal) as total_worker_time,
	cast(qsrs.max_cpu_time/1000.0 as decimal) as max_worker_time,
	cast(qsrs.avg_cpu_time/1000.0 as decimal) as [avg_worker_time],
	qsrs.avg_logical_io_reads as [avg_logical_reads],
	qsrs.max_logical_io_reads as [max_logical_reads],
	qsrs.avg_logical_io_writes as [avg_logical_writes],
	qsrs.max_logical_io_writes as [max_logical_writes],
	qsrs.count_executions,
	(qsrs.avg_logical_io_reads+qsrs.avg_logical_io_writes)/2 [avg_io],
	qsrs.avg_rowcount,
	NULL statement_start_offset,
	NULL statement_end_offset,
	qsqt.statement_sql_handle as sql_handle,
	sys.fn_varbintohexstr(qsqt.statement_sql_handle) + '_QS_' + @timestamp COLLATE Latin1_General_BIN2 as FileName,
	qsqt.query_sql_text AS query_text,
	qsp.query_plan as FileContent  
FROM sys.query_store_query qsq 
JOIN sys.query_store_query_text qsqt   
    ON qsqt.query_text_id = qsq.query_text_id   
JOIN sys.query_store_plan qsp   
    ON qsq.query_id = qsp.query_id   
JOIN sys.query_store_runtime_stats qsrs   
    ON qsp.plan_id = qsrs.plan_id  
JOIN sys.query_store_runtime_stats_interval qsrsi   
    ON qsrs.runtime_stats_interval_id = qsrsi.runtime_stats_interval_id  
WHERE CONVERT(datetime2, SWITCHOFFSET (qsrsi.start_time , @tzoffset)) >= DATEADD(hour, -24.5, @record_date)    
AND qsrs.max_duration > 1000000   
ORDER BY qsrs.avg_duration DESC

UPDATE m 
							SET m.cont_liab = t.conti_liab
							, last_upd_time = SYSDATETIME()
							FROM dbo.vcomb_comb_mappings m 
							INNER JOIN (
								SELECT comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no,  SUM(comming_banker.unit_bet * case when comming_banker.winning_status = 0 then comming_banker.odds else 1 end * ISNULL(paied_banker.banker_odds,1)) AS conti_liab
								FROM dbo.temp_banker_data AS comming_banker 
								LEFT JOIN 
									(
                        				SELECT foc_seq_no,bet_no,dbo.aggodds(winning_status,odds) AS banker_odds
										FROM dbo.temp_banker_data 
										WHERE winning_status <> 0 
										GROUP BY foc_seq_no,bet_no
									) AS paied_banker ON comming_banker.foc_seq_no = paied_banker.foc_seq_no AND comming_banker.bet_no = paied_banker.bet_no
								--WHERE comming_banker.winning_status = 0  -- comment out this sentence becasue paid out combination also needs to be re-calc
								GROUP BY comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no
							) t ON m.vcomb_id = t.vcomb_id and m.leg_no = t.leg_no

UPDATE m

							FROM dbo.vcomb_comb_mappings m 
							INNER JOIN (
								SELECT comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no,  SUM(comming_banker.unit_bet * case when comming_banker.winning_status = 0 then comming_banker.odds else 1 end * ISNULL(paied_banker.banker_odds,1)) AS conti_liab
								FROM dbo.temp_banker_data AS comming_banker

		TodayInvestment = today_1311.TodayInvestment - cancel_previous_result.cancel_previous_ticket_amt,
		TodaySoldTicket = today_1311.TodaySoldTicket - cancel_previous_result.cancel_previous_ticket_count
		from 
			( SELECT * FROM (
				SELECT ROW_NUMBER()over(partition by bizdate,sports_id, event_id, frontend_id ,BusinessDateOfEvent,is_concluded order by bizdate ,update_time desc) as row_id, * 
					FROM  dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1311 WHERE bizdate=@update_bizdate)b where b.row_id=1
			) today_1311 
			inner join (
				select ft.sports_id,
					eventMap.event_id,
					CASE WHEN ft.sports_id = 1 THEN '' ELSE ftb.frontend_id END as frontend_id, 
					count(*) as cancel_previous_ticket_count,
					sum(ft.ticket_cost_amt) as cancel_previous_ticket_amt
					from 
					fo_tickets_vw ft
					INNER JOIN fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb on ftb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id
					INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids eventMap ON eventMap.pool_id = ftb.pool_id
					INNER JOIN (select ticket_id from dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw where create_bizdate = @update_bizdate and ticket_status = 5
								group by ticket_id
							) cancel ON ft.ticket_id = cancel.ticket_id
					where ft.ticket_status = 5 and ft.selling_bizdate < @update_bizdate
					group by ft.sports_id,eventMap.event_id,ftb.frontend_id
			) cancel_previous_result ON today_1311.sports_id=cancel_previous_result.sports_id 
			  and today_1311.event_id=cancel_previous_result.event_id

UPDATE m 
							SET m.cont_liab = t.conti_liab
							, last_upd_time = SYSDATETIME()
							FROM dbo.vcomb_comb_mappings m 
							INNER JOIN (
								SELECT comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no,  SUM(comming_banker.unit_bet * case when comming_banker.winning_status = 0 then comming_banker.odds else 1 end * ISNULL(paied_banker.banker_odds,1)) AS conti_liab
								FROM dbo.temp_banker_data AS comming_banker 
								LEFT JOIN 
									(
                        				SELECT foc_seq_no,bet_no,dbo.aggodds(winning_status,odds) AS banker_odds
										FROM dbo.temp_banker_data 
										WHERE winning_status <> 0 
										GROUP BY foc_seq_no,bet_no
									) AS paied_banker ON comming_banker.foc_seq_no = paied_banker.foc_seq_no AND comming_banker.bet_no = paied_banker.bet_no
								--WHERE comming_banker.winning_status = 0  -- comment out this sentence becasue paid out combination also needs to be re-calc
								GROUP BY comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no
							) t ON m.vcomb_id = t.vcomb_id and m.leg_no = t.leg_no

(@last_60_bizdate int,@update_bizdate int,@payout_expired_bizdate int)INSERT INTO dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1321
           (bizdate
		   ,sports_id
		   ,event_id
           ,frontend_id
           ,BusinessDateOfEvent
           ,IsPayoutExpiredToday
           ,NoOfPayoutTicketToday
           ,PayoutOfTicketPaidToday
           ,NoOfUnpaidTicket
           ,LiabilityOfUnpaidTicket
           ,NoOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,TotalNoOfExpiredTicket
           ,TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket
		   ,update_time)
		SELECT  
			@update_bizdate,
		    ISNULL(c.sports_id, 0) as SportsID,
			c.event_id as event_id,
			CASE WHEN c.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(c.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END									AS FrontendID,
			ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) AS BusinessDateOfEvent,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate AND SUM(case when ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 
																				when ticket_status <> 2 AND c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate then 1
																				else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,
			--CASE WHEN ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate AND SUM(CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,
            sum (case when c.paid_bizdate=@update_bizdate and c.ticket_status in (7, 8) then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfPayoutTicketToday,  --7 paid
			sum (case when c.paid_bizdate=@update_bizdate and ticket_status in (7, 8) then c.total_payout_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end ) as PayoutOfTicketPaidToday,
			sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate>=@payout_expired_bizdate OR c.payout_expire_bizdate = 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.div_cal_amt > 0 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfUnpaidTicket,  --2 sold
			sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate>=@payout_expired_bizdate OR c.payout_expire_bizdate = 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.div_cal_amt > 0 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 end ) as LiabilityOfUnpaidTicket,  --2 sold
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfExpiredTicketToday,  	--41 PayoutStarted
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end) as LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday,  
			sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfExpiredTicketToday,  	--41 PayoutStarted
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end) as LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday,
             --sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate<=@payout_expired_bizdate AND c.payout_expire_bizdate <> 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as TotalNoOfExpiredTicket,  			
              --sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate<=@payout_expired_bizdate AND c.payout_expire_bizdate <> 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end ) as TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket 
			dbo.udf_get_time()
		FROM (/*
				  SELECT	DISTINCT 
							ft.sports_id, 
							ftc.frontend_id, 
							kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,
							ftd.concluded_bizdate,
							ft.ticket_status,
							ft.payout_expire_bizdate,
							ft.paid_bizdate,
							ftd.is_div_cal_done,
							AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, 
							AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, 
							AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt
						FROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft
						INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id
						INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id 
						INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftc.pool_id
						WHERE ft.is_head_office = 0
						AND ft.is_cancel = 0
						AND	ftc.leg_order = 1
						AND ftc.combination_order = 1
						AND ft.ticket_status in (2, 7, 8)
						UNION 
						*/
						SELECT 
							fmp.sports_type_id AS sports_id,
							fme.frontend_id,
							fme.event_id,
							kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,
							ft.ticket_status,
							isnull(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,
							ft.paid_bizdate,
							ftd.is_div_cal_done,
							ft.previous_payout_amt,
							ft.total_payout_amt,
							ftd.div_cal_amt,
							ftd.is_settled
							-- AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, 
							-- AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, 
							-- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt
						FROM
						(

							select h.event_id,h.frontend_id from fo_msg_events h
							  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status event_status on event_status.event_id=h.event_id
							  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids j on h.event_id=j.event_id
							  INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = j.pool_id
							where 
							  kickoffdate.event_settle_date >= @last_60_bizdate
							  and event_status.event_operation_status >= 4
							  and h.frontend_id is not null
							UNION 
							select h.event_id,b.frontend_id 
							from 
							(
									select ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_id
									from 
									fo_tickets ft
									JOIN
									fo_ticket_dividends ftd
									on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id
									JOIN
									fo_ticket_betlines ftb
									on
									ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id
									where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0
									and (ft.payout_expire_bizdate = 0 or ft.payout_expire_bizdate >= @update_bizdate)-- need to exclude payout expired ticket (safety when housekeep failed, usually housekeep will clean all payout expired tickets)
									and ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8) -- exclude reject & cancel

									union

									select ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_id
									from 
									settled_fo_tickets ft
									JOIN
									settled_fo_ticket_dividends ftd
									on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id
									JOIN
									settled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  --with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))
									on
									ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id
									LEFT JOIN (
												select --pool_id,
													t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, 
													CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_win 
												from (
														select  
															t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,
															t1.payout_expire_bizdate,
															eetp.last_payout_date_win,
															row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_id
														from ##tmp_fo_ba_rpt t1
														join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date 
															AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date 
														) t2 
												where t2.row_id = 1 
												and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate 
														 ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @update_bizdate
											) t3
										on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdate
									where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0
									and (ft.payout_expire_bizdate = 0 or isnull(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) >= @update_bizdate)-- need to exclude payout expired ticket (safety when housekeep failed, usually housekeep will clean all payout expired tickets)
									and ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8)  -- exclude reject & cancel
							) b
							INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids h on b.pool_id=h.pool_id
							--inner join fo_msg_events h on h.frontend_id = b.frontend_id 
							group by h.event_id,b.frontend_id

						) fme 
						--@tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id fme
						INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status fmes on fmes.event_id = fme.event_id
						INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids eiwli ON eiwli.event_id = fme.event_id
						INNER JOIN fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = eiwli.pool_id
						--INNER JOIN fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.all_up_node_key = fme.event_id
						INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = fmp.pool_id
						LEFT JOIN 
						(
							select pool_id, ticket_id from fo_ticket_betlines
							union
							select pool_id, ticket_id from settled_fo_ticket_betlines --with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))
						) ftb
						--fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb 
						on fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_id
						--LEFT JOIN fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc on ftc.pool_id = fmp.pool_id
						LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft 
							on ftb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id 
								AND ft.ticket_status in (2

									JOIN
									fo_ticket_betlines ftb
									on
									ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id

									and (ft.payout_expire_bizdate = 0 or ft.payout_expire_bizdate >= @update_bizdate)-- need to exclude payout expired ticket (safety when housekeep failed, usually housekeep will clean all payout expired tickets)

									from

									JOIN
									settled_fo_ticket_dividends ftd
									on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id
									JOIN
									settled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  --with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))

															eetp.last_payout_date_win,

															AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date

(@update_bizdate int)INSERT INTO dbo.fo_rpt_ba_1311
           (bizdate
           ,sports_id
		   ,event_id
           ,frontend_id
		   ,BusinessDateOfEvent
           ,is_concluded
           ,PreviousDaysInvestment
           ,PreviousDaysSoldTicket
           ,PreviousDaysDividend
           ,PreviousDaysDividendTicket
           ,PreviousDaysForfeitedDividend
           ,PreviousDaysForfeitedDividendTicket
           ,PreviousDaysErrorProfit
           ,PreviousDaysErrorProfitTicket
           ,PreviousDaysErrorLoss
           ,PreviousDaysErrorLossTicket
           ,PreviousDaysHODividendByHO
           ,PreviousDaysHODividendByHOTicket
           ,PreviousDaysHODividendByBranch
           ,PreviousDaysHODividendByBranchTicket
		   ,PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityBF
		   ,PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityBFTicket
		   ,PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityCF
		   ,PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityCFTicket
           ,TodayInvestment
           ,TodaySoldTicket
           ,TodayDividend
           ,TodayDividendTicket
           ,TodayForfeitedDividend
           ,TodayForfeitedDividendTicket
           ,TodayErrorProfit
           ,TodayErrorProfitTicket
           ,TodayErrorLoss
           ,TodayErrorLossTicket
           ,TodayHODividendByHO
           ,TodayHODividendByHOTicket
           ,TodayHODividendByBranch
           ,TodayHODividendByBranchTicket
		   ,TodayUnsettledLiabilityBF
		   ,TodayUnsettledLiabilityBFTicket
		   ,TodayUnsettledLiabilityCF
		   ,TodayUnsettledLiabilityCFTicket
           ,update_time)
		SELECT  
		     @update_bizdate,
		     kickoffdate.sports_type_id as SportsID,
			 h.event_id,
			 CASE WHEN kickoffdate.sports_type_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(h.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END as FrontendID,
			 ISNULL(kickoffdate.event_settle_date, 0)  as BusinessDateOfEvent,
			 case when sum( case when tkt.ticket_status in (2,7,8) and tkt_div.is_settled=0 then 1 else 0 end)=0 and @update_bizdate >= ISNULL(kickoffdate.event_settle_date, 0) and isnull(max(tkt_div.settle_bizdate),@update_bizdate) = @update_bizdate then 1 else 0 end as IsConcludedToday,
			 --PreviousDays
	         0 as PreviousDaysInvestment,
			 0 as PreviousDaysSoldTicket,
			 0 as PreviousDaysDividend,
			 0 as PreviousDaysDividendTicket,
			 0 as PreviousDaysForfeitedDividend ,  --1'payoutlimit' cancel?
			 0 as PreviousDaysForfeitedDividendTicket , --1'payoutlimit' cancel?
			 0 as PreviousDaysErrorProfit,--email 
			 0 as PreviousDaysErrorProfitTicket,
			 0 as PreviousDaysErrorLoss,--email 
			 0 as PreviousDaysErrorLossTicket,
             0 as PreviousDaysHODividendByHO,
			 0 as PreviousDaysHODividendByHOTicket,
             0 as PreviousDaysHODividendByBranch,
			 0 as PreviousDaysHODividendByBranchTicket,
			 --sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt_div.div_cal_done_bizdate<@today then cast(tkt_div.div_cal_amt as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) AS PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityBF,
			 --sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt_div.div_cal_done_bizdate<@today then 1 else 0 end ) AS PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityBFTicket,
			 --sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt_div.div_cal_done_bizdate=@today then cast(tkt_div.div_cal_amt as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) AS PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityCF,
			 --sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt_div.div_cal_done_bizdate=@today then 1 else 0 end ) AS PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityCFTicket,
			 0 as PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityBF,
			 0 as PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityBFTicket,
             0 as PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityCF,
			 0 as PreviousDaysUnsettledLiabilityCFTicket,
			 --today
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.selling_bizdate=@update_bizdate and ISNULL(tkt.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0 then cast(tkt.ticket_cost_amt as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) as TodayInvestment,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.selling_bizdate=@update_bizdate and ISNULL(tkt.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end ) as TodaySoldTicket,
			 sum(case when (tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) > 0 then cast((tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) as TodayDividend, -- include all dividend (deduct yesterday dividend later)
			 sum(case when tkt.ticket_status in (2, 7) and tkt_div.div_cal_amt >0 and (tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) >= 0 then 1 else 0 end ) TodayDividendTicket, -- include all dividend (deduct yesterday dividend later)
			 0 as TodayForfeitedDividend ,  -- obsolete in FO (Always 0)
			 0 as TodayForfeitedDividendTicket , -- obsolete in FO (Always 0)
			 --sum(case when tkt.payout_expire_bizdate<=@update_bizdate and tkt.ticket_status = 2 then cast((tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) as TodayForfeitedDividend , 
             --sum(case when tkt.payout_expire_bizdate<=@update_bizdate and tkt.ticket_status = 2 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt >0 and (tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) >= 0 then 1 else 0 end ) as TodayForfeitedDividendTicket ,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.is_paid_final = 1 and tkt_div.concluded_bizdate=@update_bizdate and tkt_div.is_concluded = 1 and tkt.total_payout_amt < tkt_div.div_cal_amt then cast((tkt_div.div_cal_amt-tkt.total_payout_amt)as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end) as TodayErrorProfit,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.is_paid_final = 1 and tkt_div.concluded_bizdate=@update_bizdate and tkt_div.is_concluded = 1 and tkt.total_payout_amt < tkt_div.div_cal_amt then 1 else 0 end) as TodayErrorProfitTicket,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.is_paid_final = 1 and tkt_div.concluded_bizdate=@update_bizdate and tkt_div.is_concluded = 1 and tkt.total_payout_amt > tkt_div.div_cal_amt then  cast((tkt.total_payout_amt-tkt_div.div_cal_amt)as decimal(28,12)) else -- paid final error loss ticket
					case when tkt.is_cancel = 0 and tkt.parent_ticket_id is not null and child_ticket_id = 0 and tkt_div.concluded_bizdate=@update_bizdate and tkt_div.is_concluded = 1 and tkt.previous_payout_amt-tkt_div.div_cal_amt>0 then cast((tkt.previous_payout_amt-tkt_div.div_cal_amt)as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end end)  as TodayErrorLoss, -- paid partial overpaid error loss ticket
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.is_paid_final = 1 and tkt_div.concluded_bizdate=@update_bizdate and tkt_div.is_concluded = 1 and tkt.total_payout_amt > tkt_div.div_cal_amt then 1 else -- paid final error loss ticket
					case when tkt.is_cancel = 0 and tkt.parent_ticket_id is not null and child_ticket_id = 0 and tkt_div.concluded_bizdate=@update_bizdate and tkt_div.is_concluded = 1 and tkt.previous_payout_amt>tkt_div.div_cal_amt then 1 else 0 end end)  as TodayErrorLossTicket, -- paid partial overpaid error loss ticket 
             sum(case when tkt.ticket_status in (2, 7) and tkt.is_head_office=1 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt >0 then tkt_div.div_cal_amt else 0 end) as TodayHODividendByHO, -- only take the most child partial-paid ticket div cal amt for allup ticket with both normal and HO bet
			 sum(case when tkt.ticket_status in (2, 7) and tkt.is_head_office=1 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt >0 and (tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) >= 0 then 1 else 0 end) as TodayHODividendByHOTicket,
             sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.is_head_office=1 and admin_release.release_to_centre_no<>0 then tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt else 0 end) as TodayHODividendByBranch,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt.is_head_office=1 and admin_release.release_to_centre_no<>0 then 1 else 0 end) as TodayHODividendByBranchTicket,
			 --sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt.ticket_status in (2,7) and tkt_div.div_cal_done_bizdate<@update_bizdate then cast(tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityBF,
			 --sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt.ticket_status in (2,7) and tkt_div.div_cal_done_bizdate<@update_bizdate then 1 else 0 end ) AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityBFTicket,
			 0 AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityBF,
			 0 AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityBFTicket,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt.ticket_status = 2 and is_head_office = 0 then cast(tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityCF,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt.ticket_status = 2 and is_head_office = 0 then 1 else 0 end ) AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityCFTicket,
			 dbo.udf_get_time()

		  --fo_msg_events h
		  (

				select h.event_id,h.frontend_id from fo_msg_events h

			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt.ticket_status = 2 and is_head_office = 0 then cast(tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt as decimal(28,12)) else 0 end ) AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityCF,
			 sum(case when tkt.is_cancel=0 and tkt_div.div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt >0 and tkt_div.is_settled = 0 and tkt.ticket_status = 2 and is_head_office = 0 then 1 else 0 end ) AS TodayUnsettledLiabilityCFTicket,
			 dbo.udf_get_time()
		FROM
		  --fo_msg_events h
		  (

				select h.event_id,h.frontend_id from fo_msg_events h
				  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status event_status on event_status.event_id=h.event_id
				  INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids j on h.event_id=j.event_id
				  INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = j.pool_id
				where 
				  kickoffdate.event_settle_date >= @update_bizdate 
				  and event_status.event_operation_status >= 4
				  and h.frontend_id is not null
				UNION 
				select h.event_id,b.frontend_id 
				from 
				(
						select ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id , ftb.pool_id
						from 
						fo_tickets ft
						JOIN
						fo_ticket_dividends ftd
						on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id

UPDATE m 
							SET m.cont_liab = t.conti_liab
							, last_upd_time = SYSDATETIME()
							FROM dbo.vcomb_comb_mappings m 
							INNER JOIN (
								SELECT comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no,  SUM(comming_banker.unit_bet * case when comming_banker.winning_status = 0 then comming_banker.odds else 1 end * ISNULL(paied_banker.banker_odds,1)) AS conti_liab
								FROM dbo.temp_banker_data AS comming_banker 
								LEFT JOIN 
									(
                        				SELECT foc_seq_no,bet_no,dbo.aggodds(winning_status,odds) AS banker_odds
										FROM dbo.temp_banker_data 
										WHERE winning_status <> 0 
										GROUP BY foc_seq_no,bet_no
									) AS paied_banker ON comming_banker.foc_seq_no = paied_banker.foc_seq_no AND comming_banker.bet_no = paied_banker.bet_no
								--WHERE comming_banker.winning_status = 0  -- comment out this sentence becasue paid out combination also needs to be re-calc
								GROUP BY comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no
							) t ON m.vcomb_id = t.vcomb_id and m.leg_no = t.leg_no

           ,LiabilityOfUnpaidTicket
           ,NoOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday
           ,TotalNoOfExpiredTicket

		   ,update_time)
		SELECT  
			@update_bizdate,
		    ISNULL(c.sports_id, 0) as SportsID,

			CASE WHEN c.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(c.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END									AS FrontendID,
			ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) AS BusinessDateOfEvent,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate AND SUM(case when ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 
																				when ticket_status <> 2 AND c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate then 1
																				else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,
			--CASE WHEN ISNULL(kick_off_date, 0) <= @last_60_bizdate AND SUM(CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and (c.is_settled = 0 or c.payout_expire_bizdate>@payout_expired_bizdate) then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 1 else 0 end as IsPayoutExpiredToday,
            sum (case when c.paid_bizdate=@update_bizdate and c.ticket_status in (7, 8) then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfPayoutTicketToday,  --7 paid
			sum (case when c.paid_bizdate=@update_bizdate and ticket_status in (7, 8) then c.total_payout_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end ) as PayoutOfTicketPaidToday,
			sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate>=@payout_expired_bizdate OR c.payout_expire_bizdate = 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.div_cal_amt > 0 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfUnpaidTicket,  --2 sold

            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfExpiredTicketToday,  	--41 PayoutStarted
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end) as LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday,  
			sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then 1 else 0 end ) as NoOfExpiredTicketToday,  	--41 PayoutStarted
            sum (case when c.payout_expire_bizdate=@payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end) as LiabilityOfExpiredTicketToday,

              --sum (case when (c.payout_expire_bizdate<=@payout_expired_bizdate AND c.payout_expire_bizdate <> 0) AND ticket_status=2 AND c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt > 0 AND c.is_settled = 1 then c.div_cal_amt - c.previous_payout_amt else 0 end ) as TotalLiabilityOfExpiredTicket

				  SELECT	DISTINCT 
							ft.sports_id,

							ftd.concluded_bizdate,

						FROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft
						INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id
						INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id

						SELECT

							UNION

									JOIN

									on

									where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0
									and (ft.payout_expire_bizdate = 0 or ft.payout_expire_bizdate >= @update_bizdate)-- need to exclude payout expired ticket (safety when housekeep failed, usually housekeep will clean all payout expired tickets)
									and ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8) -- exclude reject & cancel

									union

									select ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_id

									where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0

									and ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8)  -- exclude reject & cancel

							--inner join fo_msg_events h on h.frontend_id = b.frontend_id

									select ft.ticket_id, ftb.frontend_id, ftb.pool_id
									from 
									settled_fo_tickets ft
									JOIN
									settled_fo_ticket_dividends ftd
									on ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id
									JOIN
									settled_fo_ticket_betlines ftb  --with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))
									on
									ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id
									LEFT JOIN (
												select --pool_id,
													t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, 
													CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_win 
												from (
														select  
															t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,
															t1.payout_expire_bizdate,
															eetp.last_payout_date_win,
															row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_id
														from ##tmp_fo_ba_rpt t1
														join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date 
															AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date 
														) t2 
												where t2.row_id = 1 
												and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate 
														 ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @update_bizdate
											) t3
										on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdate
									where ftd.div_cal_amt > 0
									and (ft.payout_expire_bizdate = 0 or isnull(t3.last_payout_date_win,ft.payout_expire_bizdate) >= @update_bizdate)-- need to exclude payout expired ticket (safety when housekeep failed, usually housekeep will clean all payout expired tickets)
									and ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8)  -- exclude reject & cancel
							) b
							INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids h on b.pool_id=h.pool_id
							--inner join fo_msg_events h on h.frontend_id = b.frontend_id 
							group by h.event_id,b.frontend_id

						) fme 
						--@tvpnc_fo_1311_frontend_id fme
						INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_status fmes on fmes.event_id = fme.event_id
						INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids eiwli ON eiwli.event_id = fme.event_id
						INNER JOIN fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = eiwli.pool_id
						--INNER JOIN fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.all_up_node_key = fme.event_id
						INNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = fmp.pool_id
						LEFT JOIN 
						(
							select pool_id, ticket_id from fo_ticket_betlines
							union
							select pool_id, ticket_id from settled_fo_ticket_betlines --with(index(idx_settled_fo_betline_pool_id_inc))
						) ftb
						--fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb 
						on fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_id
						--LEFT JOIN fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc on ftc.pool_id = fmp.pool_id
						LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft 
							on ftb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id 
								AND ft.ticket_status in (2,

UPDATE m 
							SET m.cont_liab = t.conti_liab
							, last_upd_time = SYSDATETIME()
							FROM dbo.vcomb_comb_mappings m 
							INNER JOIN (
								SELECT comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no,  SUM(comming_banker.unit_bet * case when comming_banker.winning_status = 0 then comming_banker.odds else 1 end * ISNULL(paied_banker.banker_odds,1)) AS conti_liab
								FROM dbo.temp_banker_data AS comming_banker 
								LEFT JOIN 
									(
                        				SELECT foc_seq_no,bet_no,dbo.aggodds(winning_status,odds) AS banker_odds
										FROM dbo.temp_banker_data 
										WHERE winning_status <> 0 
										GROUP BY foc_seq_no,bet_no
									) AS paied_banker ON comming_banker.foc_seq_no = paied_banker.foc_seq_no AND comming_banker.bet_no = paied_banker.bet_no
								--WHERE comming_banker.winning_status = 0  -- comment out this sentence becasue paid out combination also needs to be re-calc
								GROUP BY comming_banker.vcomb_id, comming_banker.leg_no
							) t ON m.vcomb_id = t.vcomb_id and m.leg_no = t.leg_no

				OUTPUT deleted.*
				INTO dbo.previous_day_activities
				FROM dbo.activities WITH (SNAPSHOT)
				WHERE activity_bizdate <= @bizdate
